_meta.description: Human-curated, frozen link-safety allowlist for outbound links the site (and, longer-term, an automated link-vetting step) treats as trusted: the reputable-outlet table from CLAUDE.md's corroboration procedure, every content/companies/*.json official_domains[] entry, every citation/source_url hostname actually used in content/frontier_board.json and content/companies/*.json as of the Phase 6 stage-3 build, and arXiv's API/site hosts. This is deliberately separate from schemas/company.schema.json's own official_domains[]/official_repos[] fields (which are PRIMARY-source-classification inputs for the analyst's corroboration procedure only, per that schema's own description) -- this file is the outbound-link-vetting allowlist, a different concern with a different owner.
_meta.curation: This file is human-curated and frozen. It must never be regenerated automatically, rewritten wholesale, or edited by the automated daily analyst/verifier Routine or any other automated pipeline step -- additions/removals are a deliberate, logged decision at an owner/PM checkpoint, the same discipline CLAUDE.md's reputable-outlet table itself is held to.
_meta.path_scoped_note: 2026-07-21 curation pass closed the gap this note used to describe: content/companies/moonshot-ai.json and zhipu-ai.json now populate official_repos[] (https://huggingface.co/moonshotai, https://huggingface.co/zai-org), and path_scoped[] now carries the two matching entries (huggingface.co/moonshotai/*, huggingface.co/blog/zai-org/*) covering exactly the two huggingface.co citations already live in frontier_board.json/content/companies/*.json (moonshot-ai's Kimi-K2.6 model card, zhipu-ai's GLM-5.2 blog post) -- both live-verified as real, on-topic, non-redirecting pages before this change, not trusted blind. Still never add a bare github.com/huggingface.co to hostnames -- both remain multi-tenant hosts; any future huggingface.co/github.com citation outside these two prefixes needs its own path-scoped entry, the same way. cursor.com was added as a bare hostnames[] entry in the same pass (not path-scoped) since it's a single-tenant corporate blog, not a multi-tenant host -- live-verified (xai.json's cited Grok 4.5 post) before adding.
